prompt: Create a vertical pastel anime social-media greeting illustration of a youthful androgynous character with bright cyan blue fluffy bob-length hair, wearing a loose dark navy beret, an oversized navy haori-style cardigan over a white shirt, and a small blue crystal pendant necklace. The character is shown from chest up in a sunny softly blurred room by a window, warm golden morning light and bokeh in the background, holding one hand beside the cheek in a V-sign peace pose. Place a large soft-edged square privacy block over the center of the face, colored as a muted blue-to-pink gradient, hiding the facial features. Use glossy modern anime rendering, delicate linework, luminous highlights, soft sparkles, and a cute sticker-decorated layout. Add exactly 2 Japanese text stickers: a large puffy rounded headline at the upper left reading おはようございます in blue and pink letters with a thick white outline, and a cloud speech bubble at lower left reading ぴっぴ with a small pink heart. Add exactly 3 sun doodle marks near the top headline: one simple yellow sun with rays above the hair, one small yellow burst near the left side, and one curved pink heart-arrow flourish at the lower right. Add exactly 4 small flower doodles scattered around the image, plus tiny plus signs, dots, hearts, and star sparkles for a cheerful morning sticker aesthetic. Use a vertical 9:16 composition, close crop, dreamy pastel palette, high detail, clean illustration, no photorealism.
